title: Smoky Tofu Bowl
description: A flavorful and nutritious bowl filled with smoky tofu, crispy vegetables, and a hint of Venezuelan spices.

ingredients.name: Smoky seasoning blend
ingredients.notes: Available at most grocery stores or online

instructions: 2. In a large bowl, whisk together the olive oil, smoky seasoning blend, salt, and pepper.
3. Add the tofu cubes to the bowl and toss to coat.
4. Spread the tofu on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
5. Roast the tofu in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
6. While the tofu is cooking, heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
7. Add the sliced red onion and bell pepper to the skillet and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until tender.
8. Stir in the chopped cilantro and cook for 1 minute.
9. To assemble the bowls, divide the cooked vegetables among four bowls.
10. Top each bowl with a piece of roasted tofu.
11. Squeeze a sliver of lime juice over the top and serve immediately.
